hero.eyebrow: Established Indian Manufacturer & Med-Tech Integration Partner
hero.title: Medical equipment decisions backed by manufacturing discipline.
hero.description: PEIC manufactures sterilization systems in Mumbai and supports global and Indian medical technologies through specification, installation, documentation, and long-term lifecycle service.

trust_banner: Serving Hospitals, Research Institutes & Public Health Networks

hero_panel.title: Manufacturer-led procurement and service accountability
hero_panel.description: Sterilization manufacturing heritage, partner technology access, and post-sale service coordination under one technical relationship.

capabilities.label: Two Distinct Capabilities
capabilities.title: One technical partner for equipment selection, installation, and support.
capabilities.description: PEIC combines an OEM manufacturer's engineering discipline with the reach of an integration partner for global and Indian medical technologies. The result is fewer vendor handoffs, clearer service ownership, and better procurement context.

cards.title: Indigenous Manufacturing
cards.description: High-pressure sterilization systems and CSSD infrastructure engineered and assembled in Mumbai, with direct OEM accountability from specification to service.

cards.title: Medical Technology Integration
cards.description: Current associations with global and Indian medical equipment brands, supported through installation, calibration, training, and service coordination.

workflow.label: How We Work
workflow.title: Specification to uptime. One technical chain.
workflow.description: Every engagement begins with requirement mapping and ends with a defined post-sale service relationship.

steps.title: Clinical Requirement Mapping
steps.description: Departments, cycle loads, compliance requirements, and procurement constraints documented before a product is specified.

steps.title: Equipment Architecture
steps.description: PEIC-manufactured systems and partner technologies configured as one operating portfolio.

steps.title: Commissioning & Handover
steps.description: Installation, calibration, biomedical team training, and commissioning documentation at handover.

steps.title: Lifecycle Service Support
steps.description: AMC, CMC, domestic spare parts, refurbishment options, and response planning after deployment.

advantage.label: By the Numbers
advantage.title: Operational scale with accountable support.
advantage.description: A 1968-founded manufacturer with Mumbai infrastructure, pan-India service coordination, and a procurement model built around post-sale ownership.

clients.label: Client Relationships
clients.title: Trusted by demanding public institutions and research networks
clients.description: Selected institutional relationships across public health systems, national research institutes, state health departments, and public infrastructure networks.

cta.label: Procurement Conversation
cta.title: Ready to evaluate PEIC for your next procurement?
cta.description: Share your department, city, timeline, and requirement. PEIC will route the enquiry to the right commercial or technical team.
